title: Model-to-Model Protocols
concept: How future agents will communicate and negotiate directly with other agents across networks without human interfaces.

exercises.prompt: What is the main role of agentic operating systems?

options.text: They act as execution engines for processes and tool calls.
They create visual environments for AI agents.

exercises.explain: Agentic operating systems are crucial because they function as the core engines that manage processes and interactions, enabling agents to perform tasks autonomously.

cards.title: Introduction to Model-to-Model Protocols
cards.body: Imagine a future where AI agents can talk to each other without humans involved! These protocols are like the languages they use to communicate.

cards.title: What are Model-to-Model Protocols?
cards.body: Model-to-Model Protocols are communication methods that allow AI agents to exchange information and negotiate directly, without needing a human to mediate.

cards.title: Languages of AI Agents
cards.body: Think of model-to-model protocols like different languages spoken by people from various countries. Just as people need to speak or translate to communicate, agents use protocols to share and understand messages.

cards.title: An Example of Communication
cards.body: Imagine two AI agents discussing a trade of digital information. Agent A might propose a deal using a specific protocol, and Agent B responds with their terms using the same language.

cards.title: Myth: AI Agents Need Humans to Communicate
cards.body: It's a common belief that AI agents depend on humans for all interactions. In reality, they can negotiate and communicate directly through protocols!

cards.title: Visualizing Agent Communication
cards.body: Here's how agents communicate over a network. On the left, we see Agent A negotiating with Agent B directly, without any human input. On the right, human mediation complicates things.

exercises.prompt: What do Model-to-Model Protocols allow AI agents to do?

options.text: Run physical processes in the real world.

exercises.explain: Model-to-Model Protocols allow agents to communicate and negotiate among themselves, eliminating the need for human involvement.

exercises.prompt: Model-to-Model Protocols only work with human intervention.
exercises.explain: That's incorrect! Model-to-Model Protocols enable agents to communicate directly with each other.

exercises.prompt: AI agents can negotiate directly with other agents using __________.
exercises.sentence: AI agents can negotiate directly with other agents using model-to-model protocols.
exercises.explain: The correct answer is 'model-to-model protocols'. These are the specific methods enabling direct communication.

options.text: They require human mediators to function.
They enable agents to negotiate without human help.
They only work with one type of AI.

exercises.explain: The correct statement is that Model-to-Model Protocols enable agents to negotiate and communicate without needing humans to mediate.

exercises.prompt: Why are Model-to-Model Protocols important for the future of AI communication?

options.text: They create barriers for AI interactions.
They allow for efficient and direct communication between agents.
They require humans for every negotiation.
They focus only on visual communication methods.

exercises.explain: Model-to-Model Protocols are crucial because they facilitate efficient and direct communication between AI agents, allowing them to negotiate and collaborate seamlessly.
